query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a light blue top and white skirt lies on their back near the center of a steep grassy hill with arms outstretched. Trees with green foliage frame the left and right edges of the scene, and a dark rectangular structure sits near the hilltop to the right. The sun sits directly behind the crest of the hill, producing a bright radial burst of light visible between the trees.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a light blue top and white skirt lies on their back near the center of a steep grassy hill with arms outstretched, flanked by trees and a dark structure near the hilltop. An extremely overexposed sun behind the hillcrest blows out the sky and background into a blinding white burst with radiating light rays, while the lower hillside is plunged into crushed, near-black shadows that swallow detail, creating severe exposure extremes across the frame.
